name: afk-kick
description: AFK Kick — periodically checks player positions and warns/kicks idle players. A permission exempts specific players from AFK detection.

checksBeforeWarning.description: Number of idle checks before sending a warning PM to the player

checksBeforeKick.description: Number of idle checks before kicking the player

warningMessage.default: You will be kicked for being AFK!
warningMessage.description: Private message sent to the player when they reach the warning threshold

kickMessage.description: Kick reason shown to the player when they are kicked for being AFK

positionThreshold.description: Distance in blocks a player must move to be considered active (resets idle count)

permissions.description: Exempts a player from AFK detection and kick entirely

check-afk.description: Check online players for AFK and warn/kick based on configured thresholds
